# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Only the latest release receives security fixes. Please update before reporting.

| Version | Supported          |
| ------- | ------------------ |
| Latest release ([releases](https://github.com/spikeon/linapse-cad-mouse-v2/releases/latest)) | :white_check_mark: |
| Older releases | :x:        |

## Reporting a Vulnerability

**Do not open a public issue for security vulnerabilities.**

Report privately via one of:

- GitHub's [private vulnerability reporting](https://github.com/spikeon/linapse-cad-mouse-v2/security/advisories/new)
- Email: **spikeon@gmail.com**

Please include:

- A description of the issue and its impact
- Steps to reproduce (affected component: firmware, service, or configurator)
- Affected version(s) and platform (Linux / Windows / macOS)

You can expect an initial response within a few days. Once confirmed, we will
work on a fix and coordinate disclosure. Thank you for helping keep Linapse and
its users safe.
